Self disconnectors are [[Psychohazards]] which cause [[Angst]].

== Examples ==

* [[Pauline Christianity]]

== See Also ==

* other [[domiciders]]
** [[horrors]]
** [[alienators]]

== References ==
[[Category:Angst]]
[[Category:Psychohazards]]
[[sn:Self disconnectors]][[Category:Self-disconnectors]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
